title: Passkeys vs Passwords in 2026
description: A comprehensive comparison between passkeys and traditional passwords in 2026.
content:
In 2026, the transition from traditional passwords to passkeys has accelerated significantly. Passkeys, based on FIDO2 and WebAuthn standards, offer phishing-resistant security by using public-key cryptography. While passwords are still used, passkeys provide a more secure and seamless user experience across devices.

Recommended Tools

  • 1Password: A popular password manager that offers robust support for creating, storing, and syncing passkeys across all your devices.
  • YubiKey by Yubico: A hardware security key that provides physical, phishing-resistant protection for your passkeys and accounts.
